name: ollama-cpu.dnp.dappnode.eth
description:
Run large language models locally on your DAppNode. Ollama inference engine with CPU-only support.

**Features:**
- CPU acceleration for inference
- Complete privacy - all processing stays local
- Support for multiple LLM models (Llama, Mistral, CodeLlama, etc.)

**Requirements:**
- At least 8GB RAM (16GB+ recommended)
- Sufficient storage for models (10GB+ recommended)
